docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY GUMORA, MICHAEL D AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTINE ECHAVIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUMORA, MICHAEL D

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL D GUMORA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT IS CHRISTINE ECHAVIA. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUMORA, MICHAEL D IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
